data.content: Needs changes: Detail-off still fails the acceptance criteria for Codex/GPT-5.4. In the d486 implementation worktree, command_execution item.started is normalized to stream_event text ([executing] ...) instead of assistant/tool_use, so Conversation History hides the action when Detail is off and the terminal filter can still show tool-result content unless it follows a ▶ header. The current tests encode that broken normalization and do not cover the Codex regression path. Sanity gates in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-d486: lint completed with warnings only; bun x tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed; bun run build passed.
